description: Recommended `skillOverrides` patch for ~/.claude/settings.json. Each entry sets visibility for a skill. Apply selectively. Do NOT auto-apply this file — it is a recommendation for the user to merge into settings.json via /claude-env-bootstrap or manual edit.

visibility_legend.on: Name + description in Claude context; appears in / menu. (default)
visibility_legend.name-only: Name only in Claude context; appears in / menu.
visibility_legend.user-invocable-only: Hidden from Claude context; appears in / menu (user can invoke).
visibility_legend.off: Hidden from Claude context; hidden from / menu.

rationale.claude-env-bootstrap: Bootstrap has side effects (writes files, copies skills, modifies CLAUDE.md). v1.1 design: manual-first via /claude-env-bootstrap. Do not let Claude auto-fire on phrases like 'orchestrator' or 'project setup'.
rationale.authorized-pentest-validation: Active security validation MUST NEVER auto-trigger. Hard gate via disable-model-invocation:true at SKILL.md level AND user-invocable-only at settings.json level — defense in depth.
rationale.pentest-scope-and-roe: Stays visible (on). This is the governance gate that proactively reminds Claude to confirm ROE before any active testing — hiding it would defeat its purpose. Allowed-tools: Read only.
rationale.anchor-prototype-wave: Multi-surface production wave with parallel subagents. Expensive; user should explicitly trigger.
rationale.brutalist_style: brutalist-skill: experimental L3 style — requires explicit user opt-in by name.
rationale.name_only_collection: codex-dispatch / skill-creator: useful but description should not autoload to avoid drift; user-typed name still triggers.

merge_strategy.preferred: Use /claude-env-bootstrap to merge these into ~/.claude/settings.json `skillOverrides` block.
merge_strategy.manual: Open ~/.claude/settings.json, locate top-level `skillOverrides`, merge entries from this file. Do NOT replace the entire block — additive merge only.
merge_strategy.rollback: Pre-edit backup of settings.json is at ~/.claude/_backup-20260523-v4/settings.json. To revert this overrides patch: copy that file back.
